The gallery
Browse by artist
Featured artist
Vincent van Gogh
Royal Academy of Arts  ·  Fine Arts  ·  Arles, FR

Vincent's swirling post-impressionist canvases channel raw emotion through bold brushwork and electric color. His prints are among our most collected works on the platform — each one a window into a mind that saw the world differently.

View full profile →
Our mission

Art that pays.
Students
that get paid.

1
Apply with your .edu email
We verify you're an active student at an accredited university
2
Get approved by our team
We review every application personally — no auto-approvals
3
Submit your artwork to us
We handle listings, mockups, and Printful product creation
4
Earn 90% on every sale
Paid automatically via Stripe Connect. We take 10%.
For artists

Ready to sell
your art?

We handle printing, shipping, payments, and the storefront. You make great work and build your name.

By applying you agree we may showcase your work. You'll earn 90% of every sale.
